reviews.comment:
La gente atiende muy bien
Pero el concesionario tendría que tener más empatía con los socios vitalicios una barbaridad lo que le cobraron a mí marido para guardar el auto en temporada una verdadera vergüenza 190 mil.enero y 240mil en febrero espero que me cuenten porque tanto

Gracias a los vitalicios se hizo grande el acá una vergüenza voy a ir a la central de Palermo a que me digan en qué se basan para cobrar tanto? Espero me lo aclaren

(Translated by Google)
The staff is very helpful.
But the dealership should show more empathy towards lifetime members. The amount they charged my husband to store his car during the season is outrageous—190,000 in January and 240,000 in February. I hope they can explain why it's so expensive.

Thanks to the lifetime members, the dealership here has grown so much. It's a disgrace. I'm going to the main office in Palermo to ask them what they base their pricing on. I hope they clarify this for me.

reviewReply.comment: Hola Patricia, nos podrías ampliar detalles de tu experiencia?

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXbkxuRENBEAE

reviews.comment:
En el último piso, q es el destinado a los autos de temporada, sigue habiendo palomas q cagan todos los autos, con lo caro q sale la estadía tendrían q solucionarlo, con lo q sale 10 dias de estadía ahí se pagan un mes y medio de garage en ciudad e bs as, así q por favor solucionen lo de las palomas

(Translated by Google)
On the top floor, which is designated for seasonal cars, there are still pigeons defecating on all the cars. Considering how expensive the stay is, they would have to solve it. With the cost of a 10-day stay there, you pay for a month and a half of parking in Buenos Aires, so please solve the pigeon problem.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Lucero, respecto a las palomas se han intentado varias maneras no agresivas, seguimos buscando la manera.
